content.question: If Hungary implements a tiered support system similar to Finland's, will the new 'middle' tier capture unmet needs that would otherwise cluster in either the top tier or mainstream settings, or will it primarily result in relabeling/reclassification of existing identified students?
content.reduction_path: Pilot three-tier model in a subset of municipalities with detailed before-after tracking of student-level movement across tiers, mainstream placement rates, and attainment outcomes; compare outcomes against control municipalities retaining prior tier structure; survey teachers on changes in classroom composition and instructional time.
